column2:
⭐ Chinatown - FIREARM
(feat. Offset) (prod. Chinatown)
(I'M WIT' THE SQUAD, Squad)
column3: Released by Chinatown on December 3rd, 2017 onto his Soundcloud under the name 'I'M WIT' THE SQUAD'. Also was released on streaming under the name 'FIREARM' on 9/25/18 before being quickly taken down, likely because Carti and Uzi did not clear their verses. The internet archive has a 30 second snippet from spotify that still works. The song remains up on Chinatowns soundcloud. It's a stem edit created by Chinatown and Velo.

Whole Lotta Red [V1]
(Die Lit 2)
column3:
(May 11, 2018) (Die Lit is officially released) 
(June 3rd, 2018) While previewing Buffy The Body, Carti says that Die Lit 2 is coming soon
(Aug 9, 2018) Carti makes Skeleton, where he mentions Whole Lotta Red, making the name change from 'Die Lit 2' to 'Whole Lotta Red' official
(January 2019) Carti begins experimenting with his vocal range more
(Apr 20, 2019) Last song from the Whole Lotta Red April tracklist is recorded  
(May 10th, 2019)  The first known V2 session happens 
(October 1st, 2019) Carti fails to drop in the "next 60 days"

(Apr 2022) Playboi Carti announces 'MUSIC' in a interview with XXL
(Late 2022) The album is finished, unknown if it was 'MUSIC' or something else; Swamp Izzo mentioned that he and Carti did have another album together, finished.

column2: BABY BOI
column3:
(January 2023) The concept of 2 albums dropping back to back is conceived
(March 14, 2025) MUSIC releases on all DSPs
(March 15, 2025) Carti posts a screenshot of the Apple Music charts with the caption "BABY BOI OTW" on Instagram.
(March 25, 2025) MUSIC - SORRY 4 DA WAIT releases on all DSPs
(May 21, 2025) ALIVE & SOME MORE release on Instagram
(Ongoing)

(ROCK OUT)

Reworked version of 'ROCK OUT' with a NAV verse & Weeknd outro replacing Offset's contributions to the song.

(feat. Destroy Lonely, Playboi Carti, DJ Swamp Izzo) (prod. star boy, Outtatown, Gab3 & DJ Moon)
column3: Surprise bonus track on Ken's 2025 album More Chaos released a whole hour after the original album. Most likely recorded in 2022 for Ken's album "X".

column2:

(feat. Future & Playboi Carti) (prod. AyoAA & MIKE DEAN)
column3: Track 7 on Donda 2. Censored version. Removed from the first version of Donda 2 after it's release

column2:

(feat. Future & Playboi Carti) (prod. AyoAA & MIKE DEAN)
column3: Track 7 on Donda 2.1. Has an uncensored AI Ye verse replacing his first unfinished one, and later punch ins. Less carti adlibs and no future intro. Now only available on Youtube Music and Tidal

column2:
🗑️🤖 The Weeknd - Timeless (Remix)
(feat. Playboi Carti & Doechii) (prod. Pharrell Williams, Ojivolta, Twisco & MIKE DEAN)
column3: Remix made for the promotion of The Weeknd's movie "HURRY UP TOMORROW". And yet, his verse was removed for this version, with only his chorus and outro remaining. Features a verse from Doechii for the first part, and Carti's for the second part.

column2:

(feat. Playboi Carti & Future) (prod. F1LTHY & Glasear)
column3: Lacks the Bun B narrration during the intro, only found on the physical versions of JACKBOYS 2.

column2:
Travis Scott & Bun B - WHERE WAS YOU [V3]
(feat. Playboi Carti & Future) (prod. F1LTHY & Glasear)
column3: Surprise feature on Cactus Jack's collaborative project "JACKBOYS 2". Was first seen in Travis Scott's iCloud files, that showed it was recorded on December 31, 2023, alongside multiple other songs.

column2:
Travis Scott & Bun B - WHERE WAS YOU [V4]
(feat. Playboi Carti & Future) (prod. F1LTHY & Glasear)
column3: Updated version of "WHERE WAS YOU", Future's vocals are louder.

column2:

(feat. Playboi Carti) (prod. KC Da Beatmonster, AYE SHARK! & Gateway)
column3: Track 5 on "MASA". Likely recorded during 2025 due to featuring a similiar voice to "SOME MORE". This marks the first official collaboration between Playboi Carti and NBA Youngboy.

(okay)

column2:

(feat. Playboi Carti & Skooly) (prod. Clif Shayne, DJ Moon & KP Beatz)
(RATCHET, WASSUP, ATL, LEHH DO IT)
column3:
OG Filename: 07_Let's_Do_It_feat_Playboi_Carti,_Skooly_MAIN_MIX_2_SING_MASTER
Cut-down version of V4 made in November 2025 for Lil Baby's "THE LEAK$". Carti's intro is replaced by instrumental, removes Skooly's verse, less Skooly hooks, and Carti's hook repeats at the end. Carti's verse also has more autotune than the leaked one. Released on December 3rd, 2025. OG file for Let's Do It. Leaked as a bonus by Raahim for the Push Up buy.
